examples: We're taking a trip to Montana.
When they got to Montana, they put down roots and built a life.
Once you have tasted the outdoor life in southern California, it's hard to return to Montana in winter.
Glaciers in Glacier National Park in Montana advanced until the late 18th or early 19th centuries.
You come here for Gorgonzola-crusted, bone-in buffalo rib eye or red-wine-braised Montana lamb shank.
